title: Custom Resources — Accessing a custom resource
text:
Kubernetes
client libraries
can be used to access
custom resources. Not all client libraries support custom resources. The
Go
and
Python
client
libraries do.
When you add a custom resource, you can access it using:
kubectl
The Kubernetes dynamic client.
A REST client that you write.
A client generated using
Kubernetes client generation tools
(generating one is an advanced undertaking, but some projects may provide a client along with
the CRD or AA).
